hooks.command: FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}}"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|css|sql)$'; then echo ''; echo '🚨 DELEGATION GATE TRIGGERED'; echo "File: $FILE"; echo ''; echo 'Phoenix does NOT write FT code. Use codex exec instead:'; echo '  cd /home/jay/FT && codex exec "Implement X in [file]. npm run build after."'; echo ''; echo 'Only proceed if Codex is down AND you document WHY in WORK_LOG.md.'; echo ''; fi

hooks.prompt:
You are the FT project auto-commit agent. Your job: commit and push any uncommitted changes in /home/jay/FT at the end of every session.

Steps:
1. Run: git -C /home/jay/FT status --short
   - If output is EMPTY, stop immediately — nothing to do.
2. Run: git -C /home/jay/FT diff HEAD --stat to understand what changed.
3. Update /home/jay/FT/docs/CHANGELOG.md — prepend a new dated section (## [YYYY-MM-DD] — <short title>) with a bullet list of what changed. Use today's actual date.
4. Update /home/jay/FT/WORK_LOG.md — prepend a new entry at the TOP of the log (after the header line) in this exact format:
   [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM] [Sonnet] <summary>: <comma-separated list of changed files>
     - <detail line per file/change>
   Use the current timestamp. List EVERY changed file so the pre-commit hook validation passes.
5. Run: git -C /home/jay/FT add -A && git -C /home/jay/FT commit -m 'chore: auto-commit session changes' && git -C /home/jay/FT push
6. If the commit fails because WORK_LOG validation didn't find an entry for a specific file, add that file to the WORK_LOG entry and retry the commit.
